## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / infra

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`tests/`)
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] Linked to an issue (if applicable)

> Note: the `quality` (ruff/mypy) CI job is informational and will not block merge.
> Only the `test` job and a maintainer review are required.
